description: Perform a seasonal decomposition analysis on airline passenger traffic using the data in ~/Documents/gretl_data/airline_passengers.csv. Configure the dataset as a monthly time series starting in January 1949. Estimate an OLS regression model using the log-transformed passenger count as the dependent variable, with a time trend and seasonal dummy variables as regressors. Conduct a joint F-test for the significance of the seasonal dummies. Save the regression results and the F-test output to ~/Documents/gretl_output/seasonal_analysis.txt.
